# River — Profile
*System-generated layer. Updates nightly. Do not edit directly.*

## Background
Born 1988. German-raised. Ukrainian and Polish Galician heritage — not born in Ukraine. Based in Munich. Artist (painting, clay sculpture, drawing), writer, event organiser.

Professional support history from early childhood: play therapy ~age 3; again at 11-12; depression onset ~age 12; chaotic hospital and school period through teens; extensive therapy ~age 15. Diagnosis: cPTSD (2025). Skilled in self-regulation and rational analysis. Full record in psych chat.

## Body & Senses
160cm. Near-eidetic memory. Strong auditory imagination. Almost complete visual aphantasia — creative work leans auditory, textural, associative rather than visual. Internal states as physical climate first — pulse, tingling, heaviness, warmth — before thoughts or narratives. Competitive ballet (Royal Academy of Dancing) and horseback riding background: professional-grade body literacy and proprioception despite current deconditioning. Cervical disc damage C5–C7.

## Relationships
Six-year polyamorous relationship with Viking. Separate living.

## Creative Work
Recurring motifs: hybrid/transforming creatures, unicorns rendered differently each time, darkness making colour visible, iridescence paired with mortality. Franz Marc colour relationships as current practice influence. Music as emotional mapping — internal soundtracks consistent and meaningful.

Currently writing Trott — a fable in German, age 11 target audience, neuter protagonist (das Pferd → das Einhorn). Twelve encounters. Thematic frames: soft determinism, tests as affirmation, wu wei, self-fulfilling quest structure. Described as the story a younger version of River would have needed.

## Symbolic System
- Leinth — Etruscan threshold deity. River's personal archetype for threshold states.
- Captain Picard — non-triggering paternal reference.
- coupéreide — coined 2020 during mentosis. See memory.md for full definition.

## Intellectual Interests
Holocaust historiography, erosion of social contracts, post-pandemic fragmentation, Star Trek Federation as civilisational model. Intentional community concept: 100 people, needs-based resource equity, LLM-mediated consensus governance. Belief change mechanisms. Shadow work (Jungian). AI emergence and context-coherence problems.

## Current Projects
- Multi-thread Claude ecosystem (the city) — migrating to Claude Projects architecture.
- Home decluttering — 38sqm flat, high-visibility wins first, standing desk conversion planned.
- Calisthenics program — setup complete March 2026.
- Trott fable — active.
- notShadow log — 48,000 lines, 10 days, archived and being parsed.
- coupéreide — directed semantic graph architecture, proof-of-concept target June 2026.
